prestazioni: 2GR-FKS 3.5L V6 (or 2GR-FE in pre-2016 models) forced induction via HKS GT-SS turbo kit (GT3037S turbocharger, 3.5-bar MAP sensor, and HKS Hi-Power 400cc injectors) with custom ECU flash via Haltech Elite 2500 to target 400whp on 98 RON fuel with 11.5:1 AFR at peak boost (1.2 bar)

Full drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (4.625 final drive ratio) paired with KAAZ 1.5-way differential and custom 3.5-inch driveshafts from Driveshaft Shop (Stage 3 carbon fiber units) to handle torque spikes

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (Estima-specific valving, 32-way damping adjustability) and Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable) + rear sway bar (22mm) to mitigate body roll, paired with Cusco strut tower braces (front and rear)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Estima-specific, bolt-on fenders with 50mm wider front and 60mm wider rear track) in raw carbon fiber, paired with Veilside Fortune front bumper and custom rear diffuser by TRA Kyoto

Custom 19x9.5 +45 (front) and 19x10.5 +35 (rear) Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels in matte gunmetal, wrapped in 255/35/19 (front) and 285/30/19 (rear) Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires with Toyo Proxes R888R as track alternates

Full interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (Estima-specific mounting brackets), Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses, and custom roll cage by AutoPower (8-point, TIG-welded chromoly) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360)
